anyOf.description: Synchronous HTTP request/response (REST in or out).
A message broker (queue/topic) — publish/consume, driven against a mock broker (no live MQ/Kafka).
An inbound HTTP webhook the core exposes for external callbacks.

description: The transport binding a Port speaks (doc 05 §11.2). v1 ships REST + one message broker + webhook; each runs the same §2.d vector set against its mock. SFTP is design-only/post-v1 (ADR-0028).
